steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The phrase “comparatively little notice” indicates the below-sea-level effect is under-researched. The contrast word “though” signals the high-altitude studies describe the opposite: abundant research.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content: Copious means abundant and plentiful, expressing the extensive research needed. Preliminary, equivocal, and sporadic each fail to capture abundance (suggesting instead early-stage work, unclear findings, or scattered research). That matches choice B — B is correct.
